abilities.name: Feed On Paranoia
abilities.text: Once per turn. After an enemy model within 6" makes a Scheme marker, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: U Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Giant Knife
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Frantic Attack
triggers.text: This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Lure
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward this model.

triggers.name: "They're After You..."
triggers.text: If the target has a Paranoia token, it gains a Slow token. Otherwise, it gains a Paranoia token.

actions.name: Stalk
actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp toward an enemy model in its LoS.

triggers.name: "You're Not Teddy"
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action targeting a non-Teddy model that receives +1 Dmg.
